body:
Lena, it was great catching up with you at the [SynBio & Climate Summit](events/synbio-climate-summit) last week — always good to compare notes with someone who's thinking as carefully about the early-stage landscape as you are. I wanted to follow up on our conversation about the overlap between climate infra and AI compute efficiency, because I've been seeing a handful of interesting companies come through that seem to sit squarely at that intersection. A few of them are raising seed rounds right now, and I thought it might be worth a quick call to see if any would fit what [Initialized](funds/initialized-capital) is looking at alongside us. I'm not necessarily thinking formal co-investment terms at this stage, just an honest conversation about where our theses align and whether there's a deal or two worth looking at together. Would you have 30 minutes sometime the week of December 2nd? Happy to work around your schedule.

Amara
